test-case.description: Hostname matches declared intent in AllNodes
test-case.name: Server Baseline Validation.Hostname matches declared intent in AllNodes

failure.message: Expected strings to be the same, because The computer name should match your configuration. Expected (from AllNodes.psd1): 'BB-DC01' Actual (from system): 'BARM-DC-01' HINT: To fix this, use the ComputerManagementDsc module's Computer resource in your StudentConfig.ps1: Computer SetName { Name = $Node.ComputerName }, but they were different. Expected length: 7 Actual length: 10 Strings differ at index 1. Expected: 'BB-DC01' But was: 'BARM-DC-01' -^

test-case.description: Timezone matches declared intent in AllNodes
test-case.name: Server Baseline Validation.Timezone matches declared intent in AllNodes

failure.message: Expected strings to be the same, because The timezone should match your configuration. Expected (from AllNodes.psd1): 'GMT Standard Time' Actual (from system): 'Pacific Standard Time' HINT: To fix this, use the ComputerManagementDsc module's TimeZone resource in your StudentConfig.ps1: TimeZone SetTimeZone { IsSingleInstance = 'Yes' TimeZone = $Node.TimeZone } Common UK timezones: - 'GMT Standard Time' (London, no DST) - 'UTC' (Coordinated Universal Time), but they were different. Expected length: 17 Actual length: 21 Strings differ at index 0. Expected: 'GMT Standard Time' But was: 'Pacific Standard Time' ^

test-case.name: Server Baseline Validation.Windows Time service is running
